privileged_info_summary: I have verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated Webots scenario containing a drone with an initial configuration: camera width 320, height 240, FOV 1.5708, and altitude 0.5m. The task explicitly requires configuring the surveillance_camera to HD resolution (width 1280, height 720), FOV to 0.7854, adding a GPS node, and changing the SURVEILLANCE_DRONE Z translation to 5.0m. All parameters perfectly match the task instructions, starting state file, and verifier logic.
